title: Download
description: Download Atelier for Mac — free, no sign-up.

blocks.body: Free. No account. No subscription. Open the .dmg, drag to Applications, done.

blocks.heading: System requirements
blocks.body: macOS 13 Ventura or later. Apple Silicon and Intel both supported.

items.title: 1. Download
items.body: Click the button above to download the latest .dmg from GitHub Releases.

items.title: 2. Install
items.body: Open the .dmg file and drag Atelier into your Applications folder. Eject the disk image.

items.title: 3. Open
items.body: Launch Atelier from Applications. It starts with one project already seeded so you can see it in action immediately.

left.title: Where is my data?
left.body:
Everything lives in:
~/Library/Application Support/com.jude.atelier/atelier-state.json

It's plain JSON. You can open it in any text editor, back it up to wherever you want, or copy it between machines.

right.title: Updates
right.body: Atelier checks for updates silently on launch. If a new version is available you'll see a prompt in Settings (⌘,). You can also check manually anytime from the Updates section.

blocks.heading: Open source
blocks.body: Atelier is open source. Read the code, file issues, or build it yourself from the repository.
